---
title: "Results"
---

## Key findings (draft)
Add bullet points as you go.

## Figures

::: details
### Q-Q Plots

- ![Cholesterol](figures/Cholesterol..mmol.L._qqplot.png)
Appears normally distributed
- ![HDL Cholesterol](figures/HDL_cholesterol..mmol.L._qqplot.png)
Appears normally distributed
- ![HEI-FLEX](figures/HEI-FLEX_qqplot.png)
Appears normally distributed
- ![Homocysteine](figures/Homocystein..µmol.L._qqplot.png)
Appears right skewed
- ![LDL Cholesterol](figures/LDL_cholesterol..mmol.L._qqplot.png)
Appears normally distributed
- ![Pulse Wave Velocity](figures/Pulse_wave_velocity_qqplot.png)
Appears normally distributed, with one outlier
- ![Triglycerides](figures/Triglycerides..mmol.L._qqplot.png)
Appears right skewed

:::

```{r}
# If using R, put code here (optional)

# If using Python, put code here (optional)
